# CafeLuxe

CafeLuxe is a restaurant technology platform for QR ordering, digital menu, POS workflow, KOT billing, staff Android app, payment status, and business records.

Website: https://cafeluxesite.in/
Contact: nitinkumawat985@gmail.com
Phone: +91 7414853321
Managed by: Nitin Kumawat

## Core Pages
- Home: https://cafeluxesite.in/
- Features: https://cafeluxesite.in/features
- App Download: https://cafeluxesite.in/app
- About: https://cafeluxesite.in/about
- Contact: https://cafeluxesite.in/contact
- Terms: https://cafeluxesite.in/terms
- Privacy: https://cafeluxesite.in/privacy

## Product Summary
CafeLuxe helps restaurants, cafes, cloud kitchens and food businesses manage QR table ordering, digital menu access, kitchen order ticket workflows, staff-side operations and business records.

## Main Keywords
QR ordering software, restaurant POS software, KOT billing software, digital menu software, restaurant staff app, cafe billing software, QR menu for restaurants.
